response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Song 1 via on-screen text 'イケナイ太陽' as 'Ikenai Taiyou' by 'Orange Range'. Used search string: '"Ikenai Taiyou" Orange Range Japanese and English lyrics'. Lyrics successfully retrieved. \n2. Identified Song 2 via on-screen text 'Life is GAME' in the background. Used search string: '"Life is GAME" virtual idol Japanese and English lyrics'. No definitive official lyrics found for this specific virtual idol track, so lyrics fields are set to null. \n3. Segmented the video into scenes based on music performance vs. dialogue intervals.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring animated virtual characters (VTubers/Virtual Idols) performing a medley of two songs, "Ikenai Taiyou" and "Life is GAME," with dialogue intervals between the performances.

scenes.description: Introductory segment of the video with animated characters on a stage, no singing yet.
Performance of 'Ikenai Taiyou'. The title appears in the top-left corner. The virtual characters are dancing and singing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
イケナイ太陽 
 Na Na, ちょっとでいいから見せてくれないか 
 お前のセクシーフェロモンで俺メロメロ 
 Ah, 触れそうでもイケナイの！ 
 徐々に高鳴る鼓動、止められないわ 
 交わす言葉の記憶遠く 
 口元の動きに揺れ動く 
 濡れた髪を撫でた 
 そして Ah, ABC, 続かない 
 そんなんじゃダメじゃない 
 だって心の奥は違うんじゃない？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Na Na, Just for a second, won't you show me? 
 Your sexy pheromones make me melt 
 Ah, it feels like I'm about to touch you, but I can't! 
 My heart beats faster and faster, I can't stop it 
 The memories of the words we exchanged are far away 
 Trembling at the movement of your lips 
 I touched your wet hair 
 And then, Ah, ABC, it doesn't continue 
 It's no good if it's like that 
 'Cause the depths of my heart are different, aren't they?

scenes.description: Short transitional dance movement before the next performance.
Performance of 'Life is GAME'. The title appears prominently in the background. Virtual characters perform choreography.
Dialogue/MC segment where the virtual performers interact with the audience and introduce each other.
